commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds Policy plugin runtime, tests, and docs for additive `scopes.agents.<agentId>` overlays on `tools` and `agents.workspace`, plus exact `tools.alsoAllow.expected` conformance findings.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR registers two new `policy/tools-also-allow-*` IDs while the PR version of the policy Findings table omits them. The feature behavior itself is covered by added focused tests and contributor live-output proof.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated docs repair can add the missing finding-ID rows; maintainer approval remains required after that because this is a protected policy/security-boundary PR.

target.title: Policy: add agent-scoped policy overlays
